contactHeading: Get in touch if you need assistance.
contactSubText: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback, please don't hesitate to get in touch with us. Our support team is available to assist you.
aboutDescription: Cupid Flow is the smartest way to get your partner to fall in love with you all over again or to use it just as a fun tool to play together on the go. Connect with the Cupid Flow App and start having endless fun whenever you want to keep each other engaged. The Cupid Flow App turns moments with your partner into a game. It lets you interact with questions and discover little-known secrets about each other. Whether you are in a long car journey or just looking to pass time, Cupid Flow is here to bring fun, passion, and laughter wherever you are! This app works as a personalised trivia app that will take your romantic moments to a whole new level. Cupid Flow was designed with you and your partner in mind to help spark new excitement and romance and leave those mundane tasks behind. Cupid Flow is a fun way to share your interests. It will make you each feel less like strangers and more like kindred spirits!
aboutQuote:
"Netflix & Chill is outdated,
Cupid Flow & Chill is the new trend :)"
readyToPlaySubtitle: True fun begins with true love 💞
